transcription.text: Want to win fabulous prizes on your phone? Introducing the all-new Winner's Telephone Game Show! It's like being on a TV game show in your own home! I won a big-screen TV! I won this watch! It's easy. Call 1-900-9999-000. Select your favorite category and answer the question. John Wayne was press 1 for the king, 2 the duke, 3... We won a cruise! Call 1-900-9999-000. It's the fun of a game show with fabulous prizes all at home on your phone.

metadata.title: 1989 Winners! The 24 Hour Telephone Trivia Game Show 1-900-999-900
